1. Birth details:
Dilma Rousseff (born Dilma da Silva Rousseff) was born on May 13, 1947 in Belo Horizonte, Minas Gerais, Brazil. She moved to São Paulo, Brazil and was born in São Paulo, Brazil.

- He earned a Master's in Public Administration from the University of São Paulo (USP) (1973).
- Earned a Doctorate in Political Science from University of São Paulo (USP) (1980).
